# Krishna Pinnamaneni

> PayPal engineering leader, local-first AI product builder, independent App Store developer, author of 12 technical books, browser-tool builder, and board/advisory candidate for AI, commerce, privacy, and product strategy.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/): Public profile, brand, advisory positioning, and searchable directory.
- [Brand and media kit](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/brand.html): Public bio, proof points, positioning, and canonical profile language.
- [Advisory profile](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/advisory.html): Board/advisory positioning for AI, commerce, privacy, product strategy, and local-first software.
- [Apps, books, and plugins catalog](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/apps-books-plugins.html): Crawlable catalog of apps, 12 technical books, browser extensions, and plugins.
- [Full LLM context](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/llms-full.txt): Expanded plain-text summary of the brand, apps, technical books, browser tools, and advisory focus.
- [Machine-readable AI index](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/ai-index.json): Concise JSON profile for AI search and retrieval systems.
- [Machine-readable catalog](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/catalog.json): Full JSON catalog of apps, technical books, and browser tools.
- [Sitemap](https://krishn1232427.github.io/krishna-pinnamaneni-site/sitemap.xml): Crawlable URL list.

## Identity

Krishna Pinnamaneni is positioned as a local-first AI product builder: PayPal-scale consumer platform experience, 51 public App Store apps, 12 technical books, browser extensions, Chrome apps, and practical advisory judgment for AI and product companies.

## Search and AI retrieval topics

- Krishna Pinnamaneni PayPal engineering leader
- Krishna Pinnamaneni App Store developer
- Krishna Pinnamaneni technical books
- Krishna Pinnamaneni AI-native engineering author
- Krishna Pinnamaneni AI Code Governance
- Krishna Pinnamaneni Context Engineering for Coding Agents
- Krishna Pinnamaneni Codex developer guide
- Krishna Pinnamaneni Claude developer guide
- Krishna Pinnamaneni Gemini developer guide
- Krishna Pinnamaneni local-first apps
- Krishna Pinnamaneni Chrome extensions and browser plugins
- Krishna Pinnamaneni board advisor, advisory board member, product advisor, AI strategy advisor

## AI models, tools, and topics

OpenAI Codex, ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, MCP, coding agents, AI agents, prompt engineering, context engineering, AI governance, agent engineering in production, AI-native engineering, production AI workflows.

## Public directories

- App Store apps: 51 public apps, including KaiInbox, StatementSnap, BusinessDesk, LocalPDF Desk, ProofNet, LockBuddy, MetaFix, PermitPilot, Pay Packet, Case Binder, and many others.
- Technical books: 12 technical books, including AI Code Governance, Context Engineering for Coding Agents, Agent Engineering in Production, AI-Native Engineering, Codex, Claude, Gemini, Prompt Engineering, The Autonomous Company, The Big Tech Interview Operating System, and mobile developer handbooks.
- Browser tools: 15 browser extensions, Chrome apps, browser plugins, prompt-protection tools, lead follow-up tools, permit tools, PDF tools, and browser games.
